name: Escape Velocity Calculator
description: Calculate the escape velocity required to overcome a body's gravity.
formulaDescription: Escape velocity is the speed needed to break free from a body's gravitational field without further propulsion.

example.explanation: Earth's escape velocity at the surface is about 11.2 km/s.

faqs.question: Does escape velocity depend on mass?
faqs.answer: Yes, escape velocity depends on the mass of the body and the distance from its center.
